title: Floral In-Wash Fragrance Booster Bundle, 3 x 200g Scented Laundry Crystals
features: Fragrant Trio: This bundle includes three delightfully scented in-wash fragrance boosters in Floral Magnolia, Floral Jasmine, and Floral Gardenia.
Aromatic Infusion: Elevate your laundry experience by adding these crystals to your wash cycle, infusing your fabrics with long-lasting floral aromas.
Generous Portions: Each container holds 200g of scented crystals, providing ample fragrance for multiple washes.
Vibrant Designs: The containers feature vibrant floral patterns, adding a touch of elegance to your laundry room.
description: Product description Elevate your laundry experience with this delightful bundle of floral in-wash fragrance boosters. These scented laundry crystals infuse your clothes with captivating aromas inspired by nature's finest blooms. The Floral Magnolia variant envelops fabrics in the rich, velvety scent of magnolia blossoms, while the Floral Jasmine booster imparts a delicate, romantic jasmine fragrance. The Floral Gardenia booster, with its intoxicating blend of gardenia and other floral notes, adds a touch of luxury to your laundry. Each 200g canister is thoughtfully designed with vibrant floral patterns, making them a charming addition to your laundry room. Simply add a scoop to your wash cycle and let the enchanting fragrances transform your laundry into a delightful sensory experience. Indulge in the blissful aromas of these floral in-wash fragrance boosters and elevate your everyday laundry routine. Ingredients Contains: 3,7-dimethyl-1,6-octadien-3-ol,a-hexylcinnamaldehyde Directions Add a scoop to your wash cycle during laundry. See more
